header.subtitle: AI ASSISTANT
chat.emptyHint: Create or restore a Web session under Sessions, then send messages or files here.
chat.placeholder: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
chat.subtaskEmptyHint: This subtask is waiting for history or live push events.
sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.hint: Lists Web-channel sessions only. Restore switches the active session, binds, and loads server history.
sessions.previewSelect: Pick a session and click View history to load full messages here.
sessions.previewEmpty: No history messages for this session.
skills.title: Skills
skills.hint: Toggle whether each capability group is always enabled for the main planner vs sub-agents (manifest always_enable_* flags).
channels.title: Channels
channels.hint: Gateway-side OneBot settings; persisted to config/fairyclaw.env.
channels.railFoot: More IM channels may be added in future releases.
settings.title: Runtime environment
settings.hint: Edit whitelisted FAIRYCLAW_* keys (aligned with Business control plane). The UI talks to the gateway on the same origin as this page.
settings.tokenBuildOk: Token comes from /app/fc-bootstrap.js (Gateway) or VITE_API_TOKEN; it must match FAIRYCLAW_API_TOKEN.
settings.tokenBuildMissing: No token: open the UI via Gateway at /app for auto-injection, or set VITE_API_TOKEN in web/.env for vite dev.
settings.tokenServerNote: FAIRYCLAW_API_TOKEN is present on the server; it cannot be changed from this UI.
settings.envSaved: Saved; in-process settings refreshed where applicable.
agents.title: Agents (LLM endpoints)
agents.hint: Edit the document that mirrors config/llm_endpoints.yaml; Business reloads the LLM client after save.
agents.invalidJson: Root value must be a JSON object.
errors.downloadNeedToken: Download requires API token: set VITE_API_TOKEN at build time to match FAIRYCLAW_API_TOKEN.
errors.needSession: Create or select a session before uploading.
msg.fileUploaded: File uploaded; add as file segment in next message: {name}
